title: 這是一首旨在嘗試問題感且探索情感的歌曲
lyrics_text:
Verse
The days are long, the nights are short
Confusion in the air, a feeling of drift
The world moves on, but I stay behind
Holding on to memories that never end

Chorus
Cheerfulness in the face of confusion
Trying to find my way, a feeling of fusion
The melody of life, the rhythm of time
Hoping to find my place, a place so divine

End

[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
